required_preferences.fact: Post shipping updates and price changes on social media as needed throughout the week, supplementing scheduled posts with timely, on-the-fly announcements

supersedes.fact: Drafts all social media posts for the week in a single Sunday evening session — never posts on the fly

required_preferences.fact: Suspends her weekly full day off until after the festival, temporarily allowing art-related activities to fill her week to keep pace with project demands

supersedes.fact: Schedules at least one full day off every week strictly for non-art-related activities to manage burnout

required_preferences.fact: Tests every new digital illustration tool on personal projects before offering it to clients
Cooks new plant-based recipes twice a week — avoids eating out alone, only does so for social occasions
Keeps a sketchbook dedicated solely to abstract doodles with no client or product purpose
Avoids participating as an arts-and-crafts instructor at the community center until her shoulder recovers, opting for non-physical volunteer activities if she wishes to contribute

persona: A freelance graphic designer who sells custom prints online
